THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_FAITH.title: Book of Faith
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_FAITH.description: At the start of each combat, add 3 [gold]Smites[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.title: Book of Ornithology
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.descript:
At the start of each combat, add 3 [gold]Upgraded Smites[/gold] into your hand.
Your [gold]Smites[/gold] deal +2 damage.
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.flavor: Its true visage has been revealed!
THEVALKYRIE-FEATHERED_HELMET.title: Feathered Helmet
THEVALKYRIE-FEATHERED_HELMET.flavor: Mazaleth's cultists typically aren't warriors, but there are always exceptions. Though you're not a cultist, are you...?
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.title: Mystic Matchbox
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.description:
[purple]Enchanted[/purple] Attacks deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] additional damage.
[purple]Enchanted[/purple] cards grant [blue]{Block}[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.flavor: Proper lighters are rare down there.
THEVALKYRIE-BLOODIED_TITHE.title: Bloodied Tithe
THEVALKYRIE-BLOODIED_TITHE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] on an enemy with no [gold]Bleed[/gold], apply an additional [blue]{BleedPower}[/blue] [gold]Bleed[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-FISHING_HOOK.title: Fishing Hook
THEVALKYRIE-FISHING_HOOK.flavor: It brings to mind memories of dried kelp.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUDE_IDOL.title: Crude Idol
THEVALKYRIE-CRUDE_IDOL.description: At the end of your turn, lose half your [gold]Overexertion[/gold], rounded up.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUDE_IDOL.flavor: An handmade effigy of Mazaleth, encouraging its believers to reach for the sky.
THEVALKYRIE-A_LYRICS_SHEET.title: Lyrics Sheet
THEVALKYRIE-BYRD_NEST.title: Byrd Nest
THEVALKYRIE-BYRD_NEST.description: You may [gold]Hatch from the Nest[/gold] at Rest Sites. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)
THEVALKYRIE-BYRD_NEST.flavor: You are overcome with the will to protect.
THEVALKYRIE-YELLOW_BYRDPIP.title: Yellow Byrdpip
THEVALKYRIE-YELLOW_BYRDPIP.description: Upon pickup, gain the card [gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold]. A [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.
THEVALKYRIE-YELLOW_BYRDPIP.flavor: He is fiercely defensive of his shinies. He feels like a Leslio.
THEVALKYRIE-RED_BYRDPIP.title: Red Byrdpip
THEVALKYRIE-RED_BYRDPIP.description: Upon pickup, gain the card [gold]Peck[/gold]. Start every fight with 2 [gold]Byrd Strength[/gold]. Another [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.
THEVALKYRIE-RED_BYRDPIP.flavor: He has taken the role of leader of the group. He's giving you Hecry vibes.
THEVALKYRIE-BLUE_BYRDPIP.title: Blue Byrdpip
THEVALKYRIE-BLUE_BYRDPIP.description: Start every fight with an Upgraded [gold]Abnormal Instincts[/gold] in your hand. Your [gold]Abnormal Instincts[/gold] cards cost 1 less. A third [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.
THEVALKYRIE-BLUE_BYRDPIP.flavor: This one is particularly chipper! He's obviously named Dimien.
THEVALKYRIE-ARIA_OF_WIND.title: Aria of Wind
THEVALKYRIE-ARIA_OF_WIND.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Bless[/gold] your starting hand.
THEVALKYRIE-ARIA_OF_WIND.flavor: A masterpiece of historical importance. Holding this feels almost forbidden.
SEA_GLASS.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.title: Bird Glass
